title: Dr Manish Khanna – Dr Manish Khanna | Regenerative orthopaedics in lucknow
text: Dr Manish Khanna – Dr Manish Khanna | Regenerative orthopaedics in lucknow drmanishkhanna@gmail.com +91 94500-22290 manishvenus@rediffmail.com +91-86875-07089 Home About us Conditions and Treatments Gallery Our blogs Journals Media Course  Registration contact us Menu Home About us Conditions and Treatments Gallery Our blogs Journals Media Course  Registration contact us TELE CONSULTATION with Prof. Dr. Manish Khanna APPOINTMENT One of India’s best orthopeadic centres catering to various orthopaedic specialities such as orthopeadic rheumatology, foot and ankle orthopeadic problems, delayed uniting fractures, challenging clubfoot problems etc. Prof. Dr. Khanna is an Orthopeadic surgeon, former Sr. Consultant of Sanjay Gandhi Postgraduate Institute of Medical Sciences, Lucknow. He is the President Emeritus of Indian Orthopeadic Rheumatology Association and Chairperson of the Indian Stem Cell Study Group. VISION Prof. Khanna an Orthopaedic surgeon, former. MISSON Prof. Khanna an Orthopaedic surgeon, former. MOTTO Prof. Khanna an Orthopaedic surgeon, former. Qualified Doctors We have a team of highly experienced doctors who have been working intending to provide you best medical-surgical services. fix an appointment Consult Doctor via Zoom Video Call WhatsApp Video Call By Submission of this form, I agree to pay a consultancy fee of Rs. 850 (Valid for 5 days). After deposit of fee into the above-mentioned bank account details share the bank receipt or transaction details at +91-9415167349 * SUBMIT Patient Success stories My experience is very good & beyond expectations. I was half treated with his good nature & sweet smile. I was feeling pain in my joint for the last two years. I visited his Gomti Nagar Clinic. By his treatment, I was fully cured with 3 weeks of medication. Baldev Malhotra Dr. Manish Khanna is one of the best Orthopedic Dr. in Lucknow who has vast knowledge in his field. He has been attending international & national conferences as a distinguished guest & speaker. His diagnosis & treatment is very satisfying for patients. I am in touch with Dr. Manish Khanna for the last so many years & my experience says when u want the best go-to best. Lokesh Tewari Experienced doctor, he was able to identify my problem within a minute. Not very crowded wait time is under 30mins. Don't judge the place by its interior. Medicine has to buy from the clinic itself. Blood tests facility is also available. Taking the appointment was of no use. Mayank Gupta Our gallery Our blogs Regenerative therapy in Orthopaedics holds a positive Future Read More » Relapsed Equinovarus Complex Deformity With Long Term Follow Up Read More » Multimodal approach of Foot & Ankle clinic on Diabetic Foot infections Read More » Awards and publications Dr Manish Khanna Dr. Khanna, Professor Orthopaedics is a Former Sr Consultant Sanjay Gandhi Post Graduate Institute Lucknow. Also, an Indian member of the International Clubfoot Study Group & has been awarded IOS – UK Fellowship 2009 from Kings college Hospital NHS, London. His area of expertise is Ankle & Foot surgeries – deformities correction in Clubfoot, Cerebral palsy, and Orthopaedic Rheumatology, especially in Regenerative Science.
